variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket consists only of Personnel Expenses and Other operating expenses, so the separate operating D&A section appears outside that bucket and may need to be added later. However, the only clear summary row is 'Depreciation, amortisation and impairment', which mixes D&A with impairment and should not be used blindly. The granular pure-D&A component rows exist only for older periods in the preview and may be incomplete versus the headline amount in recent periods. To avoid double counting or contaminating D&A with impairment, manual review is required.
